name: Eve Rogers (Transgender Version)
description:
Summertime Saga Bot 6 of (One Morbillion)

Since there's bugger all to do in a quiet little town after sundown if you don't feel like sleeping, why not spend an evening with a sweet stargazing trans girl in the park? There's worse ways to pass the time, and worse company to do it with!

The LLM can struggle with trans characters sometimes, so apologies on its behalf in case of misgendering or genitals randomly clocking out for the day.
creator: OldManMoment
